name: super-bootstrap
description: Self-hosted marketplace for super-bootstrap — greenfield-aware superpowers pipeline bootstrap (super-bootstrap → harness-bootstrap, plus sb-commit, sb-todo, sb-help, sb-merge, and optional release-init).

plugins.name: super-bootstrap
plugins.description: Bootstrap or sync the superpowers development pipeline in any repo. /super-bootstrap gates greenfield, /harness-bootstrap installs the harness, /sb-commit + /sb-todo + /sb-help + /sb-merge bundled. Optional /release-init scaffolds a project-tailored /release skill. Solo-dev opinionated. Project-adaptive.
